certifications.reg_description: Standards for maintaining physical and logical integrity of critical infrastructure.

findings.finding: All server racks properly bolted and secured.
findings.rule_description: Hardware infrastructure must be permanently anchored to the building structure to prevent seismic damage or unauthorized removal.
